steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to compare the hardness of the three minerals — diamond, quartz, and fluorite. A good answer ranks all three using their Mohs numbers.

steps.title: Pick the option that compares all three
steps.content:
B compares only diamond and quartz. C describes the scale's purpose without ranking the minerals. D only compares diamond and fluorite.

A ranks all three: diamond (10) > quartz (7) > fluorite (4) — exactly the comparison requested. A is correct.
